commands.name: Notifications
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call notifications toggleHistory

commands.name: Control Center
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call controlCenter toggle

commands.name: Timer
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:timer toggle

commands.name: Color Scheme Editor
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:color-scheme-creator toggle

commands.name: Wallpaper
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call wallpaper toggle

commands.name: Bluetooth
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call bluetooth togglePanel

commands.name: Network
commands.command: qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call network togglePanel
